ttl.name: WIRELESS DOOR LOCK CONTROL SYSTEM (w/ Smart Key System)

step2.ptxt: This wireless door lock control function operates only when the following 4 conditions are met:

step3.ptxt: There is no wireless transmitter in the cabin.
All the doors are closed.
The power door lock system is functioning normally.
The function is not disabled by customization.

atten4.ptxt: The UNLOCK function operates even when any of the doors are open.

step2.ptxt: The wireless transmitter operational range differs depending on the situation.

step3.ptxt: The operational range differs depending on the user, the way the transmitter is held, and the location.
In certain areas, the operational range will be reduced due to the vehicle body shape and the influence of the surrounding environment.

Since the transmitter uses weak radio waves, the operational range may be reduced or the transmitter may not function if interference or stronger radio waves occur in the area where the transmitter is used.
When the battery is low, the operational range is reduced and/or the transmitter may not function.

atten4.ptxt: If the transmitter has been left in a place that is exposed to direct sunlight, such as on the instrument panel, the battery may be weakened or other problems may occur.

step1.ptxt: CHECK WIRELESS DOOR LOCK CONTROL FUNCTIONS

item.ptxt: The switches built into the door control transmitter send radio waves to the door lock control receiver.
The operational range must be taken into account during checks.

step2.ptxt: Establish conditions that allow the wireless control function to be operated successfully.

step3.ptxt: Check that all the doors lock when the LOCK switch is pressed.
Check that the driver's door unlocks when the UNLOCK switch is pressed once, and all doors unlock when pressed twice within 3 seconds.
Check that if the driver's door or all doors are unlocked with the UNLOCK switch and none of the doors are opened or locked within approximately 60 seconds, the doors automatically re-lock.
Check that if the driver's door or all doors are unlocked with the UNLOCK switch and a door is opened or locked within approximately 60 seconds, the automatic lock function does not operate.

step2.ptxt: Check the interior light ON function.

atten4.ptxt: Turn the interior light switch to the DOOR position before the check.

step3.ptxt: Check that the interior light comes on simultaneously with the unlocking operation when the UNLOCK switch has been pressed.
Check that the interior light goes off in approximately 15 seconds if none of the doors is opened after the unlocking operation.
When the doors are locked by wireless operation, the hazard warning lights flash once and the wireless door lock buzzer sounds once.
When the doors are unlocked by wireless operation, the hazard warning lights flash twice and the wireless door lock buzzer sounds twice.
When the luggage compartment door is opened by wireless operation, the wireless door lock buzzer sounds.

step2.ptxt: Check the switch operation fail-safe function.

step3.ptxt: Check that the doors cannot be locked by operating a switch while the wireless transmitter is in the cabin.

Check that the doors cannot be locked or unlocked by operating a switch on the unregistered transmitter, and that the doors are locked and unlocked by operating a switch on the registered transmitter.

Check that the corresponding operation occurs only once, and does not repeat itself while the switch is kept pressed. Check that the corresponding operation is carried out when the switch is operated repeatedly at 1-second intervals.

step2.ptxt: Check the luggage compartment door opener function.

step3.ptxt: Check that the luggage compartment door opens when the LUGGAGE OPEN switch is held down for 0.6 seconds or more.

step2.ptxt: Check the door ajar warning function.

step3.ptxt: Check that the wireless door lock buzzer sounds for approximately 10 seconds when the LOCK switch is pressed with any of the doors ajar or open.
